tasks.title: Create FilesSidebarListener event listener
tasks.spec_ref: Sidebar Tab Registration > Script is injected for Files app; Script Loading via Event Listener
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the OpenRegister app is enabled WHEN a user opens the Files app THEN the openregister-filesSidebar.js script is injected
The listener is registered in Application::registerEventListeners()

tasks.title: Create FileSidebarService with getObjectsForFile method
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN file 42 is referenced in two objects WHEN getObjectsForFile(42) is called THEN both objects are returned
GIVEN file 99 is not referenced WHEN getObjectsForFile(99) is called THEN an empty array is returned

tasks.title: Add getExtractionStatus method to FileSidebarService
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN file 42 has been extracted WHEN getExtractionStatus(42) is called THEN it returns complete status
GIVEN file 99 has never been extracted WHEN getExtractionStatus(99) is called THEN it returns extractionStatus none

tasks.title: Create FileSidebarController with API routes
tasks.spec_ref: Objects-by-File API Endpoint; Extraction Status API Endpoint
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/files/{fileId}/objects returns HTTP 200 for authenticated users
GET /api/files/{fileId}/extraction-status returns HTTP 200 for authenticated users

tasks.title: Add filesSidebar webpack entry point
acceptance_criteria: filesSidebar entry exists in webpack config

tasks.title: Create files-sidebar.js entry point with tab registration
acceptance_criteria: Two tabs registered on DOMContentLoaded
Graceful exit if OCA.Files.Sidebar is undefined

tasks.title: Create RegisterObjectsTab Vue component
acceptance_criteria: Objects displayed in semantic list
NcEmptyContent for no results
Links to OpenRegister object detail

tasks.title: Create ExtractionTab Vue component
acceptance_criteria: Extraction status displayed
Extract Now button for unextracted files
Risk level badges with text labels

tasks.title: Add translations for sidebar tab strings
acceptance_criteria: Dutch and English translations provided for all sidebar tab strings

tasks.title: Write PHPUnit tests for FileSidebarService and FileSidebarController
acceptance_criteria: Service tests cover objects-by-file and extraction status
Controller tests cover HTTP status codes

tasks.title: Verify integration with Files app and test edge cases
acceptance_criteria: Tabs appear in Files sidebar
Tabs do NOT appear outside Files app
